id: Aviation Industry Association Conference 2025-Tākina Wellington Convention and Exhibition Centre,50 Cable St, Te Aro, Wellington 6011, New Zealand, Wellington-Roxy Cinema
name: Aviation Industry Association Conference 2025
venue: Tākina Wellington Convention and Exhibition Centre,50 Cable St, Te Aro, Wellington 6011, New Zealand, Wellington
long_description:
Aviation Industry Association Conference 2025
Mark your calendars for the pre-eminent commercial operator aviation event of the year, held annually in New Zealand.

This AIANZ Conference promises to be an immersive experience, offering invaluable insights, networking opportunities, and expert-led discussions that shape the future of aviation.

Tākina Wellington Convention and Exhibition Centre, Sunday 14 to Tuesday 16 September 2025.

Harness Collective Wisdom: At AIANZ, we believe in the power of collective wisdom. By participating in our conference, you’ll have access to a wealth of industry expertise and insights. Together, we can navigate challenges and seize opportunities for the greater good of the aviation community. Don’t miss out on this unparalleled opportunity to connect, learn, and shape the future of aviation.

Calling on Exhibitors and Sponsors - we are seeking interest from sponsors and exhibitors for our Conference. Please see the prospectus here: https://aianz.org.nz/wp-content/uploads/AIANZ-Conference-Prospectus-2025-v1.pdf

Also check out other Business events in Wellington, Conferences in Wellington, Exhibitions in Wellington.

id: Wellington Go Green Expo 2025-TSB Arena,4 Queens Wharf, Wellington, New Zealand-Roxy Cinema
name: Wellington Go Green Expo 2025
venue: TSB Arena,4 Queens Wharf, Wellington, New Zealand
long_description:
Wellington Go Green Expo 2025
TSB ARENA • Saturday 1st & Sunday 2nd November

About this Event


FREE Tickets Available Online Now!
$5 adult door sales available upon entry
Children under 16 are free
Win Spot Prizes just by being there from 2pm – 4pm
Free Parking available
Expo Info - 10am - 5pm Saturday & 10am - 4pm Sunday

Get 1 Hour FREE Parking - Get 1 hour of FREE parking on us in the car park underneath the TSB Arena! Simply validate your parking ticket at the front desk when you are leaving to receive your 1-hour free parking.

New Zealand’s Largest Green Living & Sustainable Lifestyle Show! This is your one stop shop for everything you need to live a sustainable life.
Eco home/building, food and beverages, advisory services, supplements, organic products, health and wellness, beauty and personal care, household products, pet products, gardening, grocery and many more categories are showcased at this fantastic event that is not to be missed!
A large, diverse range of companies and brands cannot wait to transform your way of life, in favour of the environment and you!
This show is dedicated to promoting a healthy, environmentally friendly, sustainable lifestyle for New Zealanders.


Also check out other Business events in Wellington, Exhibitions in Wellington, Health & Wellness events in Wellington.

long_description:
Launch celebration & open day!
This is it, we're finally launching! Cahoots Workshop will be officially open from 6th September and we're celebrating with an open day! All genders are welcome to come and look around our beautiful new space on this day! We'll have signups, kai and lots of excited folks!

Also check out other Workshops in Wellington.
